title: Verify existing implementation of broken import utility
description: The task requires creating src/utils/broken-import.ts that imports from @/nonexistent/module to fail at verify/typecheck. The file already exists at src/utils/broken-import.ts with the exact content specified: it imports a nonexistent module and exports it. This is working as intended for contradiction detection testing.
